name: clodex
description: Autonomous development loop: plan, ship, run codex adversarial-review, and iterate on findings until approved or threshold/iteration cap is reached. v0.2.7 adds per-iteration iter-NNN-stalled.md (diagnostic breadcrumb for stalled/error/hang verdicts) and sharper stall detection (~3-min frozen-window vs the prior 10-min cap) so stalls surface earlier and leave a self-describing on-disk record. v0.2.6 added per-iteration iter-NNN-review.md (human-readable rendering of codex.json). v0.2.5 externalized hard rules to HARD_RULES.md, read fresh via Bash cat at the start of every run. v0.2.4 normalized .clodex/ disk layout under runs/<branch-slug>/iter-NNN-{focus.md,codex.json,fix.md}. v0.2.3 forced help/version through Bash for VS Code extension paraphrase-resistance. v0.2.2 added --version flag. v0.2.1 adapted to codex plugin v1.0.4's disable-model-invocation by invoking codex-companion.mjs directly. v0.2 baseline: hard rules, --continue flag, outage-aware retry, 3-failure-mode cap.
